name: Quick Peanut Butter Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except 2 tablespoons graham cracker crumbs. Mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into 3/4-inch balls.
3. Roll each ball in 2 tablespoons of graham cracker crumbs.
4. Store in the refrigerator. Makes about 22 cookies.
Dietary Exchanges: 1/2 Starch for 1 cookie
